details.IncidentDetail: "[4] RP IN BLU TOYT CAM VS GRY CADI SD 7YIS157."

"[5] BLK CHEV PK VS WHI TESLA ON RHS // JUST GOT IN TC TO AVOID WHI JEEP"
"[4] WHI JEEP CHK ON ITS ROOF 1125 VS SHOULDER "
